summary.change: wired native action meta.views into availableViewModes and preferredViewMode resolution so list/kanban switching can appear inside the same action page
summary.user_visible_outcome: project action pages can expose a page-level list/kanban switch without adding a sidebar nav node

commands.command: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck:strict'

notes: generic consumption of native action facts
